name: zerdr
title: Zerdrd
description: Zoxide directory picker that opens a herdr workspace with the standard 6-tab layout
author: trash-panda-v91-beta

commands.name: jump
commands.title: Jump to Directory
commands.subtitle: Herdr Jump
commands.description: Pick a zoxide directory and open it as a herdr workspace with nvim/pi/term/prs/hunk/lazygit tabs

preferences.name: zoxidePath
preferences.title: Zoxide binary path
preferences.description: Full path to the zoxide binary.

preferences.name: herdrPath
preferences.title: Herdr binary path
preferences.description: Full path to the herdr binary.

preferences.name: herdrAppName
preferences.title: Terminal app name
preferences.description: Terminal app hosting herdr; matched against aerospace app-name to switch workspace, else passed to `open -a`.
